About

I'm a data analyst and Georgia Tech OMSA candidate based in Atlanta. My work sits at the intersection of statistics, engineering, and product thinking — building forecasting models, analytics pipelines, and the interfaces that help teams act on what the data is saying.

Before joining Axiom Analytics, I worked at Meridian Group where I built self-serve reporting infrastructure for the operations team. I hold a BS in Statistics and am completing my MS in Analytics (OMSA) part-time. Outside of work I write about Bayesian inference, reproducible research, and data tooling.

Experience

  1. July 2023 – December 2023 San Jose, CA

    Data Analyst Intern

    Trinamix Inc.

    • Conducted data integrity audits across enterprise systems, identifying discrepancies in access records and ensuring data accuracy.
    • Queried thousands of SQL logs to identify and remediate 5 unauthorized access points, strengthening system security.
    • Monitored system logs for compliance with internal security policies and regulatory requirements.
    SQLData AuditingSecurity Compliance
  2. December 2022 – November 2023 Tempe, AZ

    Freelance Developer

    Yanbor LLC.

    • Led technical redesign of client-facing systems, improving overall performance by 25%.
    • Engineered a Python data processing tool that reduced processing time by 27% through algorithmic optimization.
    • Designed a chunked file-handling system to support legacy constraints and improve data throughput for large uploads.
    PythonSoftware ArchitectureJira
